headline: DuPont Launches New Ultrafiltration Modules As Shares Trade Below Targets
summary: DuPont de Nemours (NYSE:DD) has introduced new Inge ultrafiltration modules with integrated pre-filter (iP-F) to simplify water treatment system design. The launch targets municipal, industrial, and containerized water treatment operators seeking more compact setups and potential operating cost efficiencies. This product adds to DuPont's core water technologies portfolio following recent reshaping of its broader business mix. For investors tracking NYSE:DD, this move comes with the shares...
